risks.title: Packaging prerequisites must be present in release runner
evidence: Current run has successful wheel build and wheel reinstall evidence
risks.mitigation: Keep setuptools/wheel/build available in release runner image

risks.title: Sandboxed stdio probe can misclassify host-ready transport
evidence: Sandbox probe timed out while escalated host probe passed (20260308T031001Z)
risks.mitigation: Evaluate final transport readiness using intended host runtime evidence

risks.title: Config error messages are low-level for operator mistakes
risks.mitigation: Use structured validation and user-facing configuration error messages

risks.title: Troubleshooting runbook depth is limited
evidence: README has notes but no dedicated troubleshooting hardening runbook
risks.mitigation: Add runbook for stdio no-response, Playwright binary issues, and offline packaging constraints
